meta.query_interpretation: Interpreted as a geographic query, about diabetes, filtered to status RECRUITING, grouped by country.
meta.notes: A trial may run in multiple countries, so per-country counts need not sum to the total. Showing the top 15 countries by exact trial count (candidates discovered from a 300-study sample). Counts are exact per bucket (ClinicalTrials.gov countTotal); up to 5 sample studies are cited per data point.
